summary: Completed comprehensive testing of LearnWithVijayshree online tutoring website. Backend APIs working correctly with 80% success rate. Frontend fully functional with excellent user experience, responsive design, and successful form integration.

minor_bugs.issue: CORS headers not properly exposed in OPTIONS response
minor_bugs.impact: May cause issues with some browsers during preflight requests

passed_tests: Backend API root endpoint responds correctly
Appointment creation API works with proper validation
Appointment retrieval API returns data correctly
Hero section loads with proper design and CTA buttons
WhatsApp floating button is visible and functional
All sections render properly (Hero, About, Video, Features, Subjects, Blog, Footer)
Appointment form submission integrates successfully with backend
Responsive design works on mobile and desktop
SEO meta tags are present and optimized
All interactive elements have proper data-testid attributes
action_item_for_main_agent: Minor CORS headers issue in OPTIONS response - consider adding explicit CORS headers to OPTIONS method responses for better browser compatibility

success_percentage.frontend: 100% (all UI elements, form submission, responsive design working)
